name: Kawagoe
description: Kawagoe is a scenic destination in the Saitama region of Japan, offering rich history and cultural attractions.
parking: Available but traffic can be slow in town.

itineraries.name: Plan A: Little Edo Walk
itineraries.description: Experience the historic warehouse district and famous candy alley.

steps.activity: Arrive at Kawagoe Station and take the retro loop bus.
Stroll the Kurazukuri Zone (Warehouse District) and photograph the Toki no Kane (Time Bell Tower).
Enjoy local sweet potato treats and traditional eel (unagi) for lunch.
Explore Kashiya Yokocho (Candy Alley) for retro Japanese sweets.
Visit Kitain Temple, featuring the only remaining buildings of the original Edo Castle.

itineraries.name: Plan B: Shrines & Culture
itineraries.description: A deeper dive into local traditions, focusing on the famous Hikawa Shrine.

steps.activity: Visit Hikawa Shrine. Walk through the tunnel of wind chimes (in summer) or ema.
Fish for your fortune using a small fishing rod at the shrine.
Lunch at a traditional Japanese restaurant near the Honmaru Goten.
Tour Kawagoe Castle Honmaru Goten, the former samurai lord's residence.
Relax at a retro coffee shop on Taisho-roman Street.

notes: Famous for sweet potato snacks and traditional unagi.
